goal: 让 OpenNori 从只保存目标、AC、证据、报告的验收工具，升级为能先确立 Architecture Baseline，并让 agent 在后续实现 AC 时持续沿用该技术架构的验收驱动产品；用户不仅能判断产品目标是否完成，也能判断交付物是否按确认过的优秀技术架构完成。

acceptance_basis.summary: User approved Architecture Baseline as part of the OpenNori acceptance loop while keeping Product AC and Architecture Checks separate.

completion.answer: Complete: all required acceptance criteria have passing or waived evidence.

intervention.action: No user intervention is currently required.

evidence_health.summary: Latest evidence is reviewable enough for the current contract.

next_recommendation.summary: This OpenNori goal is complete. If the user has asked to continue, start the next acceptance loop without waiting for another next-step prompt.
actions: Select the next human-facing project goal from the current context, draft acceptance criteria, and continue the OpenNori loop.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我在编辑器或文件浏览器里打开 active Nori Contract 后，能在 60 秒内看懂目标、分层验收标准、每条状态和当前缺口。

latest_evidence.summary: Active Nori Contract markdown shows the goal, layered criteria, criterion statuses, Nori Profile section, and current rule in one readable file.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我运行 opennori check 后，能知道验收标准是否仍然是用户视角，而不是技术实现清单。

latest_evidence.summary: opennori check validates user-perspective criteria and rejects implementation-only AC wording while also reporting acceptance_quality, architecture_check, and evidence_health.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

latest_evidence.summary: High-risk criteria still require strong evidence, and weak passing evidence is downgraded; evidence_health now also prevents broad summary evidence from being treated as confidently complete.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.
latest_evidence.limitations: This is local repository evidence for the current worktree; npm publishing and public site deployment are separate release steps.

latest_evidence.summary: opennori report leads with decision summary, goal, acceptance basis, Nori Profile, acceptance status, evidence health, user intervention, and conclusion.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check and opennori check, then inspect the referenced source, tests, protocol, and generated report.

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori now audits existing active contracts after upgrade: opennori check returns acceptance_quality warnings for weak ACs without rewriting contract or evidence, upgrade points agents to run check, and docs/Skill Pack describe the upgrade-safe path.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check, inspect the check audits existing active contracts test, run opennori check on this repo and verify acceptance_quality is clear, and inspect upgrade next_actions.
latest_evidence.limitations: The first audit is intentionally heuristic and conservative: it catches common weak AC wording without rewriting existing project history; domain-specific follow-up remains agent and user responsibility.

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori 0.1.5 fixes the short agent entry too: opennori --json now routes to bootstrap preview, so agents and CI do not need to remember bootstrap --json.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我用自然语言告诉 agent 一个非平凡目标后，能先看到 Product AC 和 Architecture Baseline，让我判断要完成什么以及准备按什么技术架构完成。

latest_evidence.summary: Architecture Baseline loop now lets a user preview and confirm the architecture separately from Product AC before implementation.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm test, then inspect architecture baseline commands and nori-architecture-brainstorm Skill output.
latest_evidence.limitations: This proves the local OpenNori Architecture Baseline loop; true external-user validation still requires a non-OpenNori dogfood project.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我确认 Architecture Baseline 后，新开的 agent session 能在项目里看到这条架构约束，并知道后续实现必须沿用它。

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori agent-readable surface is current for new sessions: repository Skill Pack is in sync, global OpenNori Skills match the repository copies, and the Agent Workbench dogfood project was refreshed through preview-first install so its Skill Pack and Architecture Baseline route are ready.

sources.command: for name in nori nori-acceptance nori-evidence nori-capability-profile nori-architecture-brainstorm nori-architecture-apply nori-architecture-challenge nori-build-vs-buy nori-project-health nori-reporting; do cmp -s .agents/skills/$name/SKILL.md /Users/jarl/code/jarlone/.agents/skills/$name/SKILL.md || echo DIFF-$name; done

latest_evidence.reviewability: Run the compare loop and AW doctor/status commands; verify no DIFF output, AW doctor status ready, skill_pack.in_sync true, workflow_status complete, evidence_health clear, and architecture.decision valid.
latest_evidence.limitations: This proves current local Codex-accessible Skill surfaces and the AW dogfood checkout; other machines need their own Skill installation or project-local Skill Pack refresh.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我可以选择 OpenNori 内置优秀架构 profile，也可以声明自己的项目架构 profile，并让它影响 baseline 和完成判断。

latest_evidence.summary: Architecture Profiles are now reviewable before baseline confirmation: architecture profiles --json exposes built-in and project profile validity, suitable use cases, sources, principles, checks, preferred libraries, avoid boundaries, and build-vs-buy policy; tests cover built-in and project profiles.

sources.label: node --test --test-name-pattern 'architecture baseline loop|project architecture profiles|skill export' test/core.test.js
sources.command: node --test --test-name-pattern 'architecture baseline loop|project architecture profiles|skill export' test/core.test.js

latest_evidence.reviewability: Run architecture profiles --json and inspect agent-native-cli fields; run the targeted architecture profile tests.
latest_evidence.limitations: This uses OpenNori's existing profile model rather than a generic registry; richer schema validation can be reconsidered if profile complexity grows.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，当 agent 认为 baseline 不适合当前项目时，我看到明确 Architecture Challenge，而不是 agent 静默改架构。

latest_evidence.summary: Architecture Challenge command records evidence-backed baseline conflicts and marks architecture as challenged instead of allowing silent replacement.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run npm test and inspect the architecture challenge regression test and Skill rules.
latest_evidence.limitations: The self repo currently has no open challenge because the current baseline is valid; behavior is covered in isolated test projects.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我查看 status/report 时，能看到 Product decision 和 Architecture decision 分开呈现。

latest_evidence.summary: report --json now exposes Product decision fields and Architecture decision together: workflow_status, current_gap, completion, intervention, evidence_health, architecture.decision, and next_recommendation; targeted regression tests cover complete and evidence-review report JSON.

sources.label: node --test --test-name-pattern 'evidence can drive|evidence health|architecture baseline loop' test/core.test.js
sources.command: node --test --test-name-pattern 'evidence can drive|evidence health|architecture baseline loop' test/core.test.js

latest_evidence.reviewability: Run the listed report JSON command and targeted tests, then inspect src/cli.js report handler and test/core.test.js assertions.
latest_evidence.limitations: This verifies the local CLI JSON report surface; public npm users need the next package publish to receive it.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我运行 doctor/check 时，能知道 Architecture Baseline 是否可用、项目提示是否同步、Skill Pack 和 manifest 是否记录该能力。

latest_evidence.summary: opennori check now reports architecture_check alongside acceptance_quality, with active-goal Architecture Baseline decision, warnings, agent surface state, and recovery guidance; doctor and manifest also mark the current active goal as requiring a valid baseline.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Run opennori check and inspect data.architecture_check.status, decision, warnings, and architecture.required_for_goal; run doctor and inspect architecture_baseline, architecture_agent_guide, architecture_agent_surface, and skill_pack_sync checks.
latest_evidence.limitations: This verifies OpenNori-owned architecture health checks; richer schema validation may need a future build-vs-buy decision if profile/baseline schemas become more complex.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我在 agent 准备自研基础设施前，能看到它已经比较过可复用选择，并说明为什么仍要自研或复用。

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori records build-vs-buy decisions before custom infrastructure and includes the current self-build decision for Architecture Baseline CLI state work.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Open the build-vs-buy decision and verify current project, standard library, official SDK, open source, recommendation, and self-build reason are reviewable.
latest_evidence.limitations: The recorded decision intentionally permits short-term self-build for the baseline state layer; it also states that later CLI architecture repair must re-evaluate mature CLI libraries.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我查看 OpenNori 自身 dogfood 状态时，能知道 Architecture Baseline 已建立，但后续架构修复是否真的完成不能被最小可运行结果误报。

latest_evidence.summary: OpenNori applied the confirmed agent-native-cli baseline beyond module extraction by replacing growing ad hoc CLI option scanning with Node.js standard-library parseArgs tokens, preserving the opennori command surface and repeated source flags without adding a new dependency.

sources.label: node --test --test-name-pattern 'quickstart|evidence records flexible|evidence can drive|install|upgrade|uninstall|profile check' test/core.test.js
sources.command: node --test --test-name-pattern 'quickstart|evidence records flexible|evidence can drive|install|upgrade|uninstall|profile check' test/core.test.js

sources.label: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/architecture.js && node --check src/lifecycle.js && node --check src/acceptance.js && node --check src/skills.js
sources.command: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/architecture.js && node --check src/lifecycle.js && node --check src/acceptance.js && node --check src/skills.js

latest_evidence.reviewability: Run the listed parser, syntax, architecture, and quickstart/evidence/lifecycle tests; inspect src/cli.js for node:util parseArgs use and the build-vs-buy decision for the standard-library reuse rationale.
latest_evidence.limitations: This still keeps a thin compatibility wrapper around parseArgs and does not migrate to a full CLI framework; if command complexity keeps growing, the baseline says to re-evaluate commander/cac/citty with a new build-vs-buy decision.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我打开 README 或官网时，能理解 OpenNori 同时提供产品验收、架构基线、证据和完成判断，而不是只看到旧的验收工具心智。

latest_evidence.summary: README, protocol, Skill Pack, and website now explain that Architecture Profiles are reviewable before confirmation, including sources, checks, preferred libraries, avoid boundaries, and build-vs-buy policy.
latest_evidence.reviewability: Read the Architecture Baseline sections in README/protocol, inspect nori-architecture-brainstorm, and inspect the website Architecture Baseline use case/capability copy.
latest_evidence.limitations: The website source is updated locally; public deployment remains a separate release/deploy step.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我能在一个非 OpenNori 项目里完整跑通自然语言目标、Product AC、Architecture Baseline、执行、证据、报告和完成判断。

latest_evidence.summary: 在非 OpenNori 项目 Agent Workbench 中完整跑通：acceptance discovery 暴露入口缺口，draft 后修正为 AW 用户视角 AC，安全升级旧 OpenNori 接入，导入 AW project architecture profile，确认 Architecture Baseline，记录 build-vs-buy decision，doctor ready，status/report complete。
latest_evidence.reviewability: 复查 AW 的 .opennori active contract、baseline、decision、report，以及 OpenNori CLI 输出。report 显示 workflow_status=complete，architecture decision=valid。
latest_evidence.limitations: dogfood 目标聚焦已使用 OpenNori 项目的 Architecture Baseline 升级与 agent-readable surface，没有改 AW 业务功能。过程中发现并修复两个 OpenNori 产品缺口：已有项目安全合并 route/刷新 Skill，以及高风险证据 gate 对可复查工具/产物证据过窄。

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: 将 acceptance discovery、brainstorm 和 AC quality audit 从 CLI 入口拆到领域模块
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Acceptance discovery 和 AC quality audit 是 OpenNori 的核心产品领域逻辑，应从 CLI 入口拆到 src/acceptance.js；当前规则是小型、确定性的启发式，不需要引入 NLP 或 schema 库。

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: 让 opennori check 同时暴露 active goal 的 Architecture Baseline 健康和恢复建议
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: architecture_check 是 OpenNori 自有验收状态语义：它复用现有 architectureState、agent surface 和 active goal 恢复逻辑，把 baseline missing/draft/invalid/challenged/stale surface 作为 check warnings 暴露给 agent 和用户。

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Expose reviewable Architecture Profile details before baseline confirmation
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Reuse OpenNori's existing architecture profile state and CLI JSON surface to expose applies_to, sources, principles, checks, preferred libraries, avoid boundaries, and build-vs-buy policy before baseline confirmation.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Replace growing ad hoc option scanning with a standard-library-backed argument parser while preserving the existing opennori command surface.
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Reuse Node.js standard library parseArgs tokens for option lookup and repeated flags instead of adding commander/cac or expanding custom array scanning. This keeps the CLI dependency-free while aligning with agent-native-cli build-vs-buy policy.

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: 支持 Architecture Baseline 命令入口和 agent-readable 状态
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: 当前阶段先沿用现有单文件 CLI 命令分发补齐产品状态对象，避免在架构修复前引入 CLI 框架迁移风险；后续 CLI 架构修复必须重新评估 commander/citty/cac 等成熟库。

build_vs_buy_decisions.need: Warn when a complete-looking OpenNori goal relies on stale, summary-only, or bulk-template evidence
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Reuse OpenNori's existing evidence ledger fields to audit evidence health without forcing adapters: created_at, sources, reviewability, limitations, basis, confidence, and summary patterns are enough for first-pass warnings.

build_vs_buy_decisions.id: skill-pack-将-opennori-skill-pack-从-cli-入口拆到独立产品面模块
build_vs_buy_decisions.need: 将 OpenNori Skill Pack 从 CLI 入口拆到独立产品面模块
build_vs_buy_decisions.summary: Skill Pack 是 OpenNori 自有产品文案和 agent 路由面，不需要新增运行时依赖；拆成 src/skills.js 可以让 CLI 更 thin，同时保留纯字符串定义和生成函数。
build_vs_buy_decisions.path: .opennori/architecture/decisions/skill-pack-将-opennori-skill-pack-从-cli-入口拆到独立产品面模块.json
